attrs.fact: On 10:47 am on 6 May, 2023, Andrew said he has been looking for a doggo to adopt by browsing websites, visiting shelters and asking friends of theirs.
attrs.quote: Since we last spoke, I've been looking for a doggo to adopt - browsing websites, visiting shelters and asking friends of theirs. It's been both fun and annoying!
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_5_D5:1; speaker=Andrew; listener=Audrey; session_time=10:47 am on 6 May, 2023]
Hey! Since we last spoke, I've been looking for a doggo to adopt - browsing websites, visiting shelters and asking friends of theirs. It's been both fun and annoying!

[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_5_D5:2; speaker=Audrey; listener=Andrew; session_time=10:47 am on 6 May, 2023]
Sounds like a fun and demanding task! Getting to meet new pups must bring so much happiness. What  do you think you can do to make the process smoother?

[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_5_D5:3; speaker=Andrew; listener=Audrey; session_time=10:47 am on 6 May, 2023]
Meeting all these adorable pups has been awesome! For those considering getting a pup, the size of living space and the exercise needs of the breed are important. For me, a person living in an apartment, a smaller dog would be best, but if one is active, consider getting one that loves to play and run.

[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_5_D5:4; speaker=Audrey; listener=Andrew; session_time=10:47 am on 6 May, 2023]
That's some good advice! It's important to consider the space and energy needs of a dog.

attrs.fact: On 8:32 pm on 3 July, 2023, Audrey said she is taking a dog training course which is challenging but rewarding, and her dogs are doing better already.
attrs.quote: I'm taking a dog training course and it's challenging but rewarding. My dogs are doing better already.
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_10_D10:1; speaker=Audrey; listener=Andrew; session_time=8:32 pm on 3 July, 2023]
Hey! It's been a while. I'm taking a dog training course and it's challenging but rewarding. My dogs are doing better already. What's new with you?

[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_10_D10:2; speaker=Andrew; listener=Audrey; session_time=8:32 pm on 3 July, 2023]
Hey great to hear from you! Life's thrown me a few curveballs lately. Still can't seem to find any dog-friendly spots to rent. That's a bummer. Have you been able to do any exploring on new trails?

[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_10_D10:3; speaker=Audrey; listener=Andrew; session_time=8:32 pm on 3 July, 2023]
Aw, sorry about the search for dog-friendly spots. I haven't had a ton of time for new trails either. The dog-training course has been a big time sink but it's paid off because they're doing great.

[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_10_D10:4; speaker=Andrew; listener=Audrey; session_time=8:32 pm on 3 July, 2023]
That's great news! It must feel so rewarding to see them doing well. I understand how it feels on missing the peace of being out on the trails, but for now, it's just urban adventures then.

attrs.fact: On 9:48 am on 8 July, 2023, Andrew said he had a picnic with his girlfriend and it was so much fun.
attrs.quote: Last Friday was amazing - I had a picnic with my girlfriend and it was so much fun!
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_11_D11:1; speaker=Andrew; listener=Audrey; session_time=9:48 am on 8 July, 2023]
Hey how's it going? Last Friday was amazing - I had a picnic with my girlfriend and it was so much fun! Being in the nature can be so refreshing and it always brings me joy. 

[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_11_D11:2; speaker=Audrey; listener=Andrew; session_time=9:48 am on 8 July, 2023]
Wow sounds like the picnic was awesome! Yeah being in the nature is so nice. My furry friends always make me happy. We had a great walk the other day - felt really good!

[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_11_D11:3; speaker=Andrew; listener=Audrey; session_time=9:48 am on 8 July, 2023]
That's awesome! Dogs really make life more fun doesn't it. I wish I could get one, but like I said, it's tough to find a place and find the right dog. How did you get yours?

[turn_id=conv-44_conv_session_11_D11:4; speaker=Audrey; listener=Andrew; session_time=9:48 am on 8 July, 2023]
Thanks! I got lucky finding a breeder nearby that has the dogs I wanted. Yeah places that allows dogs are really hard to find unfortunately .
